lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲੀਐ ਸੰਕ ਉਤਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: antar kee gat jaaneeai gur mileeai sank utaar |
lines.english: Know the state of your inner being; meet with the Guru and get rid of your skepticism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਹਦ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਹਾਵਣੇ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: anahad sabad suhaavane paaeeai gur veechaar |2|
lines.english: The beautiful, Unstruck Sound of the Shabad is obtained, contemplating the Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਇਆ ਜਿਤੁ ਘਰਿ ਜਾਈਐ ਤਿਤੁ ਜੀਵਦਿਆ ਮਰੁ ਮਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: mueaa jit ghar jaaeeai tith jeevadiaa mar maar |
lines.english: To reach your True Home after you die, you must conquer death while you are still alive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੇ ਆਪਣਾ ਹਉ ਸਦ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੈ ਤਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: satagur seve aapanaa hau sad kurabaanai taas |
lines.english: I am forever a sacrifice to those who serve their True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਹਦ ਬਾਣੀ ਪਾਈਐ ਤਹ ਹਉਮੈ ਹੋਇ ਬਿਨਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: anahad baanee paaeeai teh haumai hoe binaas |
lines.english: The Unstruck Melody of Gurbani is obtained, and egotism is eliminated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਦੇਖਾ ਤਹ ਰਵਿ ਰਹੇ ਸਿਵ ਸਕਤੀ ਕਾ ਮੇਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeh dekhaa teh rav rahe siv sakatee kaa mel |
lines.english: Wherever I look, I see the Lord pervading there, in the union of Shiva and Shakti, of consciousness and matter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੜਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਪੈਨਾਈਐ ਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kharr daragah painaaeeai mukh har naam nivaas |3|
lines.english: They are dressed in robes of honor in the Court of the Lord; the Name of the Lord is on their lips. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਹੁ ਗੁਣ ਬੰਧੀ ਦੇਹੁਰੀ ਜੋ ਆਇਆ ਜਗਿ ਸੋ ਖੇਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: trihu gun bandhee dehuree jo aaeaa jag so khel |
lines.english: The three qualities hold the body in bondage; whoever comes into the world is subject to their play.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਜੋਗੀ ਦੁਖਿ ਵਿਛੁੜੇ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਲਹਹਿ ਨ ਮੇਲੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: vijogee dukh vichhurre manamukh laheh na mel |4|
lines.english: Those who separate themselves from the Lord wander lost in misery. The self-willed manmukhs do not attain union with Him. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਘਰਿ ਵਸੈ ਸਚ ਭੈ ਰਾਤਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: man bairaagee ghar vasai sach bhai raataa hoe |
lines.english: If the mind becomes balanced and detached, and comes to dwell in its own true home, imbued with the Fear of God,

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਮਹਾਰਸੁ ਭੋਗਵੈ ਬਾਹੁੜਿ ਭੂਖ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: giaan mahaaras bhogavai baahurr bhookh na hoe |
lines.english: then it enjoys the essence of supreme spiritual wisdom; it shall never feel hunger again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹੁ ਮਨੋ ਮੂਰਖੁ ਲੋਭੀਆ ਲੋਭੇ ਲਗਾ ਲੋੁਭਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: ehu mano moorakh lobheea lobhe lagaa loubhaan |
lines.english: This foolish mind is greedy; through greed, it becomes even more attached to greed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਰਿ ਮਿਲੁ ਭੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥੫॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: naanak ihu man maar mil bhee fir dukh na hoe |5|18|
lines.english: O Nanak, conquer and subdue this mind; meet with the Lord, and you shall never again suffer in pain. ||5||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਜੇ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਾ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਣੀ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: saadhoo satagur je milai taa paaeeai gunee nidhaan |1|
lines.english: One who meets with the Holy True Guru finds the Treasure of Excellence. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਨ ਭੀਜੈ ਸਾਕਤਾ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਆਵਨੁ ਜਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabad na bheejai saakataa duramat aavan jaan |
lines.english: The evil-minded shaaktas, the faithless cynics, are not attuned to the Shabad; they come and go in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਛੋਡਿ ਗੁਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: man re haumai chhodd gumaan |
lines.english: O mind, renounce your egotistical pride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਰਵਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਤੂ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਮਾਨੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har gur saravar sev too paaveh daragah maan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Serve the Lord, the Guru, the Sacred Pool, and you shall be honored in the Court of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਿ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਰਾਤਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਜਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam jap dinas raat guramukh har dhan jaan |
lines.english: Chant the Name of the Lord day and night; become Gurmukh, and know the Wealth of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਸੁਖ ਹਰਿ ਰਸ ਭੋਗਣੇ ਸੰਤ ਸਭਾ ਮਿਲਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabh sukh har ras bhogane sant sabhaa mil giaan |
lines.english: All comforts and peace, and the Essence of the Lord, are enjoyed by acquiring spiritual wisdom in the Society of the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤਿ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਸਤਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਆ ਨਾਮੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: nit ahinis har prabh seviaa satagur deea naam |2|
lines.english: Day and night, continually serve the Lord God; the True Guru has given the Naam. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂਕਰ ਕੂੜੁ ਕਮਾਈਐ ਗੁਰ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਪਚੈ ਪਚਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: kookar koorr kamaaeeai gur nindaa pachai pachaan |
lines.english: Those who practice falsehood are dogs; those who slander the Guru shall burn in their own fire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮੇ ਭੂਲਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਘਣੋ ਜਮੁ ਮਾਰਿ ਕਰੈ ਖੁਲਹਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: bharame bhoolaa dukh ghano jam maar karai khulahaan |
lines.english: They wander lost and confused, deceived by doubt, suffering in terrible pain. The Messenger of Death shall beat them to a pulp.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਸੁਭਾਨੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: manamukh sukh na paaeeai guramukh sukh subhaan |3|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs find no peace, while the Gurmukhs are wondrously joyful. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਥੈ ਧੰਧੁ ਪਿਟਾਈਐ ਸਚੁ ਲਿਖਤੁ ਪਰਵਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: aithai dhandh pittaaeeai sach likhat paravaan |
lines.english: In this world, people are engrossed in false pursuits, but in the world hereafter, only the account of your true actions is accepted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਜਣੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਦਾ ਗੁਰ ਕਰਣੀ ਪਰਧਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: har sajan gur sevadaa gur karanee paradhaan |
lines.english: The Guru serves the Lord, His Intimate Friend. The Guru's actions are supremely exalted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਕਰਮਿ ਸਚੈ ਨੀਸਾਣੁ ॥੪॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: naanak naam na veesarai karam sachai neesaan |4|19|
lines.english: O Nanak, never forget the Naam, the Name of the Lord; the True Lord shall bless you with His Mark of Grace. ||4||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਤਿਲੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਰੋਗੁ ਵਡਾ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: eik til piaaraa veesarai rog vaddaa man maeh |
lines.english: Forgetting the Beloved, even for a moment, the mind is afflicted with terrible diseases.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਅਗਨਿ ਮਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਮਾਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur miliai sukh paaeeai agan marai gun maeh |1|
lines.english: Meeting with the Guru, peace is found. The fire is extinguished in His Glorious Praises. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਜਾ ਹਰਿ ਨ ਵਸੈ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: kiau daragah pat paaeeai jaa har na vasai man maeh |
lines.english: How can honor be attained in His Court, if the Lord does not dwell in the mind?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: man re ahinis har gun saar |
lines.english: O mind, enshrine the Praises of the Lord, day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਖਿਨੁ ਪਲੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਤੇ ਜਨ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jin khin pal naam na veesarai te jan virale sansaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: One who does not forget the Naam, for a moment or even an instant-how rare is such a person in this world! ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਈਐ ਸੁਰਤੀ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਸੰਜੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: jotee jot milaaeeai suratee surat sanjog |
lines.english: When one's light merges into the Light, and one's intuitive consciousness is joined with the Intuitive Consciousness,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿੰਸਾ ਹਉਮੈ ਗਤੁ ਗਏ ਨਾਹੀ ਸਹਸਾ ਸੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: hinsaa haumai gat ge naahee sahasaa sog |
lines.english: then one's cruel and violent instincts and egotism depart, and skepticism and sorrow are taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਮੇਲੇ ਗੁਰੁ ਸੰਜੋਗੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh jis har man vasai tis mele gur sanjog |2|
lines.english: The Lord abides within the mind of the Gurmukh, who merges in the Lord's Union, through the Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਕਾਮਣਿ ਜੇ ਕਰੀ ਭੋਗੇ ਭੋਗਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa kaaman je karee bhoge bhoganahaar |
lines.english: If I surrender my body like a bride, the Enjoyer will enjoy me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਸਿਉ ਨੇਹੁ ਨ ਕੀਜਈ ਜੋ ਦੀਸੈ ਚਲਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: tis siau nehu na keejee jo deesai chalanahaar |
lines.english: Do not make love with one who is just a passing show.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਰਵਹਿ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੇਜ ਭਤਾਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: guramukh raveh sohaaganee so prabh sej bhataar |3|
lines.english: The Gurmukh is ravished like the pure and happy bride on the Bed of God, her Husband. ||3||
